title: BEM-541.4 Telegram delivery synthetic v2
objective:
Run script:
"""
base = Path('governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541')
base.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
reports = Path('governance/reports')
proofs = Path('governance/codex/proofs')
transport = Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
outbox = Path('governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl')
contour_status_path = Path('governance/state/contour_status.json')
cycle = 'bem541-telegram-delivery-synthetic-e2e'

outbox_record = {
  'record_type':'telegram_hourly_report',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'delivery_mode':'curator-hourly-report.yml_schedule_to_outbox_then_sender',
  'canonical':True,
  'status':'queued_for_sender',
  'message':'BEM-541 Telegram delivery synthetic E2E v2 | blocker=null | 2026-05-17 | 14:26 (UTC+3)',
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:26 (UTC+3)',
  'blocker':None,
  'security':'no token in file; runtime sender secret only'
}
outbox.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
with outbox.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    f.write(json.dumps(outbox_record, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

lines = outbox.read_text(errors='ignore').splitlines()
matched_line_no = None
matched = None
for idx, line in enumerate(lines, start=1):
    if not line.strip():
        continue
    try:
        rec = json.loads(line)
    except Exception:
        continue
    if rec.get('cycle_id') == cycle:
        matched_line_no = idx
        matched = rec

if matched is None:
    status = 'failed'
    blocker = {'code':'OUTBOX_RECORD_NOT_FOUND'}
    message_hash = None
else:
    status = 'sent_synthetic'
    blocker = None
    text = matched.get('message','')
    checksum = 0
    for ch in text:
        checksum = (checksum + ord(ch)) % 100000000
    message_hash = 'synthetic_checksum_' + str(checksum)

delivery = {
  'record_type':'telegram_delivery_result',
  'cycle_id':cycle,
  'source':'telegram_sender_synthetic',
  'from_role':'telegram_sender',
  'to_role':'curator',
  'status':status,
  'outbox_line':matched_line_no,
  'message_hash':message_hash,
  'attempt':1,
  'retry_allowed': False if status == 'sent_synthetic' else True,
  'next_retry_at': None if status == 'sent_synthetic' else '2026-05-17 | 15:26 (UTC+3)',
  'artifact_path':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/telegram_delivery_synthetic_result.json',
  'commit_sha':None,
  'blocker':blocker,
  'created_at':'2026-05-17 | 14:26 (UTC+3)'
}
(base/'telegram_delivery_synthetic_result.json').write_text(json.dumps(delivery, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
with transport.open('a', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    outbox_transport = dict(outbox_record)
    outbox_transport['record_type'] = 'telegram_outbox_delivery_test'
    outbox_transport['artifact_path'] = 'governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl'
    outbox_transport['commit_sha'] = None
    f.write(json.dumps(outbox_transport, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')
    f.write(json.dumps(delivery, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

contour = json.loads(contour_status_path.read_text()) if contour_status_path.exists() else {}
contour['updated_at'] = '2026-05-17 | 14:26 (UTC+3)'
contour['telegram_delivery_synthetic'] = {'status':status,'outbox_line':matched_line_no,'delivery_result':'governance/internal_contour/tests/bem541/telegram_delivery_synthetic_result.json'}
contour['blocker'] = blocker
contour_status_path.write_text(json.dumps(contour, indent=2, ensure_ascii=False)+'\n')

ok = blocker is None
report = reports/'bem541_4_telegram_delivery_synthetic_e2e.md'
report.write_text('# BEM-541.4 | Telegram Delivery Synthetic E2E | ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + '\n\nДата: 2026-05-17 | 14:26 (UTC+3)\n\n## Выполнено\n- Created canonical outbox item.\n- Synthetic sender read `governance/telegram_outbox.jsonl`.\n- Delivery result appended to transport.\n- No live token/secrets in files.\n\n## Delivery\n| Наименование | Описание | Обоснование |\n|---|---|---|\n| outbox_line | ' + str(matched_line_no) + ' | line read from telegram_outbox.jsonl |\n| delivery_status | ' + status + ' | synthetic sender result |\n| retry_allowed | ' + str(delivery['retry_allowed']) + ' | retry only on failed delivery |\n\n## Blocker\n' + ('null' if ok else json.dumps(blocker, ensure_ascii=False)) + '\n')
proof = proofs/'bem541_4_telegram_delivery_synthetic_e2e.txt'
proof.write_text('BEM-541.4 ' + ('PASS' if ok else 'BLOCKER') + ': telegram outbox read and delivery_result=' + status + '\n')
changed_files.extend([str(outbox), str(base/'telegram_delivery_synthetic_result.json'), str(transport), str(contour_status_path), str(report), str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('BEM-541.4 Telegram delivery synthetic E2E completed after sandbox-safe checksum fix')
"""
No issue comments.
